overview: Kami Shopsy is a full-featured online store with 12 product categories, 20+ items per category, checkout with Cash on Delivery or EasyPaisa payment, WhatsApp order notifications, and a password-protected admin panel.
features: 12 product categories (Perfume, Ladies, Mens, Baby, Home Decor, etc.)
20+ products per category with images and prices
Customer checkout with Name, Phone, Address, City
Cash on Delivery and EasyPaisa (03457393786) payment options
Password-protected admin panel for products and categories
Admin can add/edit/delete products and prices
Kami Shopsy branded header with uploaded logo
